evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Implementation of quality controls and data governance with automated testing
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The responsibilities are dominated by governance, testing frameworks, KPI standardization, and quality controls with no velocity or shipping-speed language present anywhere.
evidence.domain_risk: Defining and maintaining KPI definitions and business glossaries
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: This is broadcast media business reporting and KPI standardization without explicit financial-reporting, regulatory, or compliance language, placing it at moderate risk.
evidence.collaboration_width: upstream and downstream teams; BI, analytics, and data science teams
evidence.data_team_maturity: Supporting BI, analytics, and data science teams with reliable data products
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Multiple named data sub-teams (BI, analytics, data science) with distinct charters plus multi-market collaboration across three countries indicates an established, mature data function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Development and optimization of curated and serving-layer models with dbt
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Precise technical specificity around curated/serving-layer models, dimensional modeling, and named tools (Airflow, BigQuery, dbt macros) shows someone who has done this job wrote it.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Supporting BI, analytics, and data science teams with reliable data products
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The primary audience is the data function itself — BI, analytics, and data science teams consuming reliable data products — making this internal_data.
evidence.autonomy_level: Establishing end-to-end testing frameworks for pipelines
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role combines establishing frameworks and standards (strategic) with supporting other teams' data product needs (execution), reflecting genuine mixed autonomy for a lead role.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The JD contains no mention of AI tools or AI-consuming infrastructure anywhere in the text.
evidence.testing_framing: Establishing end-to-end testing frameworks for pipelines
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing frameworks are framed as something the candidate establishes and owns using an explicit ownership verb, making this a responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Implementation of quality controls and data governance with automated testing
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Quality controls, governance, and testing appear repeatedly but the JD is still primarily framed around building and supporting data products rather than a full risk/compliance register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Development and optimization of curated and serving-layer models with dbt
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role mixes building new dimensional models with optimizing existing curated layers and establishing governance frameworks, indicating mid-to-mature scaling work.
evidence.loss_aversion: Implementation of quality controls and data governance with automated testing — reflects operational concern about data reliability across a multi-market data function.
